title: Filling the x-axis on a bar chart
excerpt:

posts.author: neilfry (Neil)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a bar chart with week numbers on the x-axis and a count of activity on the y-axis. If I filter on a particular client and there is no data for a particular week, then that label doesn’t show up
Is there any way to have a fixed x-axis? I’d like to have all 52 labels regardless of the data.
